sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 5g. cholesterol, saturated fat, and polyunsaturated fat are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 5g. cholesterol, saturated fat, and polyunsaturated fat are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 3.9g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for dairy, that is exactly the kind of thing you want.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 3.9g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for dairy, that is exactly the kind of thing you want.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 9g. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 9g. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 22% DV, vitamin a at 2% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 22% DV, vitamin a at 2% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 11% DV, zinc at 5% DV, magnesium at 3% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 11% DV, zinc at 5% DV, magnesium at 3% DV stand out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side. excellent dairy-category fit because strong protein usefulness with a clean dairy identity makes it a textbook high-performing dairy food. quite filling for the calories because the protein density gives it strong practical satiety value. easy high-protein staple because very easy to build meals or snacks around.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides. saturated fat is not trivial because still much cleaner than weak dairy foods, but not ultra-low-fat. not suitable for everyone because lactose tolerance and dairy tolerance vary. healthiness can shift with toppings because sugary add-ins can change the practical outcome fast.

sections.subtitleText: now the downsides. saturated fat is not trivial because still much cleaner than weak dairy foods, but not ultra-low-fat. not suitable for everyone because lactose tolerance and dairy tolerance vary. healthiness can shift with toppings because sugary add-ins can change the practical outcome fast.

closing.summary: Greek Yogurt has a genuinely strong overall case, especially excellent dairy-category fit and quite filling for the calories. the downsides are there, but saturated fat is not trivial and not suitable for everyone do not outweigh the upside. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in S tier.
